sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_h3_data (h3Index UInt64, coordinates Array(Array(Float64)));
INSERT INTO geo_h3_data (h3Index, coordinates) VALUES (644325524701193974, h3ToGeoBoundary(644325524701193974));
UPDATE geo_h3_data SET coordinates = h3ToGeoBoundary(644325524701193974) WHERE h3Index = 644325524701193974;
SELECT h3Index, h3ToGeoBoundary(h3Index) AS boundaries FROM geo_h3_data;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_h3_data WHERE length(coordinates) > 0;
